evidence: standards/enterprise/privacy-compliance.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: Consent or tracking deviations require designated human Privacy or Legal authority, exact purpose and processing, user impact, owner, expiry, compensating control, and removal plan.
statement: Collection or tracking that requires consent starts only after the applicable informed choice is recorded, and denial or revocation propagates to SDKs, queued work, identifiers, and downstream processing.
